assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes MigrationsAssembly set to the current project assembly in both store configurations
assertions.rationale: Both stores include sql.MigrationsAssembly(migrationsAssembly) where migrationsAssembly = typeof(Program).Assembly.GetName().Name

assertions.assertion: The response includes a dotnet ef migrations add command with -c ConfigurationDbContext
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef migrations add InitialConfigDb --context ConfigurationDbContext

assertions.assertion: The response includes a dotnet ef migrations add command with -c PersistedGrantDbContext
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef migrations add InitialOpsDb --context PersistedGrantDbContext

assertions.assertion: The response includes dotnet ef database update commands for both contexts
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef database update --context ConfigurationDbContext and --context PersistedGrantDbContext
